data.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Validated tests fail RED. Output: PASSED: 0  FAILED: 3. All 3 tests fail as expected: test_project_setup_redirects, test_dev_onboarding_redirects, test_design_onboarding_redirects. Initial grep pattern was too loose (matched incidental content in existing SKILL.md files); updated to require explicit redirect phrases like 'renamed to /dso:onboarding' that only appear in actual redirect stubs.
